belier.intro: Today arrives with unusual gravity: the Last Quarter Moon sits in your own sign at 11 degrees Aries, squaring the Cancer Sun while Neptune stations retrograde just degrees away in your first house. This is a celestial crossroads where the fire of self-assertion meets a veiling mist of spiritual revision. Who you believed yourself to be last week may feel less certain now, and that uncertainty is not a setback but an invitation to become more truly yourself. Neptune retrograde has begun its work of dissolving what was never real.
belier.love: Romantic ideals may feel temporarily blurred under Neptune's retrograde influence in your first house. Rather than chasing a vision of perfect love, let today soften your expectations and reveal the actual person standing before you. Love becomes more honest and more durable when it releases the pressure of illusion.
belier.work: Creative or leadership-oriented work encounters a fog today that resists being pushed away by force. The retrograde asks you to review rather than to conquer. Return to a project you set aside weeks ago and see what it looks like with fresh and uncertain eyes.
belier.energy: The Last Quarter Square can feel like a sudden drop in momentum, a quarter-turn of the cosmic wheel calling you to pause mid-stride. Your energy replenishes through stillness today, not through more action.
belier.intuition: Neptune retrograde in your first house sharpens your spiritual antennae while blurring the logical ones. Visions, dream imagery, and inexplicable knowings carry real guidance. Question what feels certain; trust what feels mysteriously known.
belier.mantra: I release the version of myself that fear invented.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Last Quarter Moon blazes at 11 degrees Aries in your twelfth house of hidden worlds and private retreat, while Neptune turns retrograde in that same deep, shadowed territory. The veil between the visible and invisible grows especially thin for you today, and illusions you have been carrying in secret begin to dissolve gently but unmistakably. The Cancer Sun in your third house brings voice to what has been wordless, bridging inner knowing and outer communication.
taureau.love: A conversation that reaches the unspoken layers of your relationship becomes possible and important today. With Mercury retrograde in your third house, choose words with particular care, especially around topics you have been circling for weeks without naming.
taureau.work: Productivity is quieter and more internal than usual. Retreat from noise, review old files or dormant projects, and let your subconscious process what your busy mind has not yet examined. Insights arrive most clearly in the stillness.
taureau.energy: Your energy is deep but not accessible by force today. Nourish your wellbeing with slow movement, beautiful music, or time near water. Fighting the reflective pull of this day will cost you more than surrendering to it.
taureau.intuition: With Neptune turning retrograde in your twelfth house, the very domain it rules, your inner compass may feel simultaneously more powerful and harder to read. Sit quietly for even ten minutes and let the signal clarify.
taureau.mantra: I rest in the mystery and trust that clarity will come.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Last Quarter Moon at 11 degrees Aries fires through your eleventh house of communities, ideals, and future visions while Neptune turns retrograde in that same territory. A hope or group aspiration that once felt certain may now seem more complex than you imagined. This is not the death of the dream but its maturation: Neptune retrograde strips away the glamour to reveal what is actually worth building together. The Sun in Cancer energizes your second house, connecting collective vision to the practical question of your own true values.
gemeaux.love: Social connections may feel more fluid and harder to define today. A friendship that has blurred toward romance, or a romantic connection that has felt more like a friendship, may require honest examination under Neptune's clear retrograde gaze.
gemeaux.work: Group projects or team dynamics may be more elusive than expected. A shared vision may need renegotiation, not because it failed but because it has evolved. Your adaptable mind is exactly the right instrument for navigating that shift.
gemeaux.energy: Mental agility is your default, but today it benefits from physical grounding. A brief walk or time outdoors restores the balance your quick mind needs to process what the retrograde is revealing.
gemeaux.intuition: Your intuition about group dynamics and collective motives sharpens considerably today. When something feels off about a shared project or a social dynamic, you are almost certainly picking up on something real beneath the surface.
gemeaux.mantra: I see through the illusion and find the truth worth keeping.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: Today the Last Quarter Moon squares your Sun directly from 11 degrees Aries, and Neptune stations retrograde in your tenth house of career and public reputation. This is a significant turning point: illusions about your professional identity or the direction your public role has been taking begin dissolving under the retrograde's sober, clarifying gaze. Your Sun in your own sign gives you the emotional resilience to face what the fog is lifting. What you thought your career was building toward may need to be honestly reimagined.
cancer.love: With Mercury retrograde in your sign and the Last Quarter activating the Sun-Moon axis, emotional processing takes center stage. You may feel pulled between your own deep needs and the demands of a partner or public role. Give yourself permission to feel everything without needing to resolve everything today.
cancer.work: A professional project or public-facing effort reaches a turning point. Neptune retrograde in your career house asks you to distinguish between what genuinely serves your calling and what is performance or social expectation. Honest reassessment now leads to more authentic direction ahead.
cancer.energy: The tension of the Last Quarter Square translates physically as a sense of suspension, as though you are held between one phase and the next. Rest into this pause rather than straining through it. Integration takes energy too.
cancer.intuition: Your intuition about professional matters is highly activated today, even if the signals feel veiled or paradoxical. Pay special attention to a recurring feeling about a professional relationship or direction that you have been trying to logic away.
cancer.mantra: I release the role that no longer reflects who I truly am.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Last Quarter Moon at 11 degrees Aries ignites your ninth house of expansion, philosophy, and distant horizons while Neptune turns retrograde in that same visionary zone. A belief or ideal that has been guiding your recent path may now reveal itself as more complex or less certain than you assumed. This is not disillusionment; it is the natural maturing of a vision that was always meant to grow beyond its first form. The Cancer Sun nourishes your twelfth house, drawing your spirit inward even as the Aries fire calls you outward.
lion.love: Long-distance connections or relationships that involve meaningfully different worldviews may reveal a tension today between the ideal and the lived reality. Have you been seeing a relationship through a rose-colored lens? Neptune retrograde gently removes that filter for your lasting benefit.
lion.work: Projects involving education, publishing, or wide-reaching outreach reach a point of honest reckoning. The work itself may be good, but is it aligned with your deepest truth? Review what you have been putting your faith in, professionally speaking.
lion.energy: The Aries Moon gives you occasional bursts of inspired fire, but Neptune's retrograde quickly absorbs them into a contemplative haze. Alternate between action and quiet reflection without judging the rhythm of your output today.
lion.intuition: Philosophical and spiritual guidance is especially potent now. A belief you have held for years may quietly crack open to reveal something truer inside. Receive this not as loss but as an invitation to grow.
lion.mantra: I align my vision with my most honest and courageous self.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Last Quarter Moon at 11 degrees Aries activates your eighth house of shared resources, transformation, and psychological depth while Neptune turns retrograde in that intense territory. Illusions about shared finances, a power dynamic, or the emotional architecture of a close bond surface for honest and compassionate examination today. The Cancer Sun in your eleventh house brings community warmth to what might otherwise feel like a heavy day, reminding you that you do not navigate transformation entirely alone.
vierge.love: Hidden feelings about emotional and material entanglements with a partner come to the surface now. The retrograde does not manufacture drama; it removes the veil from what has already been quietly forming beneath the surface. Gentle, honest conversation serves you both.
vierge.work: Financial or contractual matters require careful review under this configuration. Do not proceed with joint ventures or significant agreements until the Neptune fog has cleared in the coming weeks. Today is for assessing, not committing.
vierge.energy: The depth of today's cosmic configuration can feel draining if you are not grounded. Physical work, organizing your space, or time in a garden connects you to your native earth element and restores your equilibrium.
vierge.intuition: Your intuition around shared resources and subtle power dynamics is exceptionally sharp today, even if the reasoning behind it feels murky. If something in a financial or emotional partnership feels wrong, investigate before acting.
vierge.mantra: I see through the surface to the truth that sets me free.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Last Quarter Moon at 11 degrees Aries lands directly in your seventh house of partnership and committed relationship while Neptune stations retrograde in that same territory. Illusions about a partner or a committed bond begin dissolving today, not cruelly but necessarily, as Neptune retrograde lifts a veil that has been softening the edges of what is actually there. The Cancer Sun activating your career zone asks you to balance the demands of public ambition with the intimate truths now surfacing.
balance.love: The fog of Neptune in your relationship house lifts today under the retrograde station. You may see a partnership more clearly than you have in some time, which can be both relieving and disorienting. The truth of what is actually present, without the gloss of expectation, is the only real foundation for love.
balance.work: Negotiations, collaborations, and public-facing work may feel more uncertain than usual. Hold the space of not-knowing with grace and avoid forcing premature conclusions in any professional partnership today.
balance.energy: The tension of the Last Quarter in your relationship house can feel personally disorienting, as though the ground you stand on has shifted slightly. Ground yourself by returning to your own center: what do you value, apart from what others reflect back at you?
balance.intuition: Your intuition about relationship dynamics is at an unusual high today. The gut feeling you have been setting aside about a partner or close colleague is almost certainly worth a patient, honest second look.
balance.mantra: I see my relationships clearly, with both courage and compassion.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Last Quarter Moon squares the Cancer Sun from 11 degrees Aries, activating your sixth house of daily habits, health, and service. Neptune turns retrograde in this practical territory, dissolving illusions about your routines and the true sustainability of how you spend your energy. The Cancer Sun in your ninth house offers philosophical perspective, lifting your gaze above the daily details to the larger purpose your everyday life is meant to serve.
scorpion.love: A partner's daily habits or a recurring pattern in your shared rhythm comes into clearer focus today. Something that has felt vaguely off in the domestic or day-to-day texture of your relationship now asks to be named and addressed with care.
scorpion.work: Work-related illusions dissolve under Neptune's retrograde in your sixth house. A project, a role, or a working relationship that has not been all you imagined it to be becomes clearer today. This is useful intelligence, not defeat.
scorpion.energy: Your physical energy is less predictable than usual, sensitive to the emotional undercurrents running through the day. Honor your body's signals carefully; it is trying to tell you something specific about what genuinely sustains you.
scorpion.intuition: Your intuition about your own body and health rhythms is acutely sharp today. If you have been ignoring a physical signal, the Last Quarter Moon asks you firmly to stop and listen to it.
scorpion.mantra: I strip away what is false and tend faithfully to what is true.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Last Quarter Moon blazes at 11 degrees Aries in your fifth house of creativity, joy, and romance while Neptune turns retrograde in that same expressive zone. This is a moment to examine honestly what you truly enjoy, without the influence of what you think you should enjoy or what makes a good story about yourself. The Cancer Sun in your eighth house brings emotional depth and psychological intensity to this questioning, inviting you to feel the difference between genuine delight and socially performed enthusiasm.
sagittaire.love: A romantic connection may feel both more vivid and more uncertain today. Neptune retrograde in your fifth house can reveal whether a romantic vision has been more about the fantasy than the actual person in front of you. Let this be a gift rather than a grief.
sagittaire.work: Creative projects may hit a conceptual turning point today. The Aries Moon fires your ambition, but Neptune's retrograde asks you to revisit your original inspiration and examine whether the idea is as solid as it felt at the start. Honest revision leads to something richer.
sagittaire.energy: The fire of the Aries Moon gives you passionate bursts of energy, but Neptune's fog keeps them brief today. Work in creative sprints and give yourself permission to rest between them without judgment.
sagittaire.intuition: Your creative intuition is especially vivid and productively unreliable today. Trust the strange, illogical images and inspirations that arrive; they are pointing toward something your logical mind cannot yet frame.
sagittaire.mantra: I create from joy, not from obligation or the need for approval.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Last Quarter Moon at 11 degrees Aries fires into your fourth house of home, roots, and ancestral foundations while Neptune stations retrograde in that intimate domestic territory. Illusions about your home life or family situation surface gently but insistently today. Something you have believed about where you come from or where you truly belong is shifting, and the shift is necessary. The Cancer Sun in your seventh house mirrors this back through your most important partnership, asking whether the foundations you stand on are genuinely solid.
capricorne.love: The tension of the Last Quarter Square touches your home and relationship axis simultaneously. A partner may reveal a truth about domestic life that requires honest engagement rather than graceful avoidance. This conversation, though uncomfortable, is the kind that builds something real.
capricorne.work: The retrograde in your fourth house may make working from home feel particularly hazy or emotionally charged today. Separate the personal from the professional with deliberate care and do not let one domain bleed into the other.
capricorne.energy: A restlessness in your foundations translates into physical unsettledness. Walking outdoors, especially on earth or grass, helps discharge the tension and restores your characteristic Saturnian equilibrium.
capricorne.intuition: Gut feelings about your family, home environment, or your earliest emotional conditioning are especially trustworthy today. A long-held family story may reveal a crack in its certainty; look at what has always seemed unquestionable.
capricorne.mantra: I build on what is real and release what was only a story.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Last Quarter Moon at 11 degrees Aries fires through your third house of mind, communication, and local environment while Neptune turns retrograde in that same airy domain. Illusions about a conversation, a plan, or a communication dynamic are gently but firmly dismantled. Your co-ruler Pluto, retrograde in your own sign, deepens this examination of how you think and how you present your ideas to the world. The Cancer Sun in your sixth house connects clarity of thought directly to your daily practice and physical wellbeing.
verseau.love: Conversations with a partner or close friend may touch unexpected emotional depth today. Beneath the surface-level exchange, a more significant dialogue about truth, trust, and genuine understanding is waiting to happen. Let it happen.
verseau.work: Mental projects, writing, and communication strategies deserve careful review today. A plan you were confident about may reveal a logical gap or a hidden assumption. This is exactly the right moment to find it and correct it before it becomes a problem.
verseau.energy: Your mind is busy even when your body is still today. Give your thinking self a genuine rest by spending time outdoors or engaging in a simple physical task that does not require cognitive effort.
verseau.intuition: Your intuition speaks through the quality of language today: when something said to you lands wrong or right in your gut before your mind has processed it, that is valuable information worth following.
verseau.mantra: I speak with precision and listen with my whole being.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Last Quarter Moon crests at 11 degrees Aries in your second house of finances, personal values, and material anchors while Neptune, your ruling planet, turns retrograde from that same pioneering sign. This double activation of your ruler is significant: the area of life where you have been operating on faith or beautiful intuition alone is now brought into sharper and less comfortable focus. Neptune retrograde dissolves the comfortable haze and asks, with uncommon directness, what is truly real and sustainable here.
poissons.love: Material security and emotional value are intertwined in your mind today. You may find yourself questioning whether a relationship offers the real, lived comfort you need or whether you have been romanticizing its practical dimensions. Allow the distinction to clarify at its own pace.
poissons.work: Financial review is the order of the day. With your ruler Neptune retrograde and the Last Quarter Moon tensing your second house, do not make major financial commitments today. Assess, investigate, and wait for genuine clarity before proceeding.
poissons.energy: Your energy may feel unusual today, neither fully earthed nor fully flowing. This in-between quality is Neptune's retrograde at work. Honor it by staying gentle with yourself and avoiding the harshness of self-judgment.
poissons.intuition: Neptune retrograde activates your native intuitive depth in a particular and inward-turning way: instead of flowing freely outward, your psychic sense asks you to verify what you have always assumed to be true. This internal audit is genuinely valuable.
poissons.mantra: I ask for what is real and release what was only beautiful.
poissons.author: Sibylle
